betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Arc Welder§f

§aWelds cast plates into heavy structural components. Used for missiles, oil refinery, and fusion.§f

§6Crafting§f (at Tier 2 Anvil):
§b• Cast Steel Plate ×4§f
§b• Tungsten Ingot ×8§f
§b• 10k-20Hz Transformer§f
§b• Graphite Electrode ×2§f

§6Usage§f:
3 color-coded item slots (red/yellow/green ports), 1 fluid input. Power + recipe in GUI.

§6Key Products§f:
§b• Welded Plate§f: 2 cast plates → 1 welded plate. Used in oil refinery, Watz, fusion reactor.
§b• Simplified Components§f: circuits, motors — alternate cheaper recipes.
§b• Missile Assembly§f: generic missile construction.

§eTip§f: Welded plates are a bottleneck for oil refining. Set up automated cast plate production before building the arc welder.
